title: KISS decoder accepts pre-FEND garbage as a frame
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/kiss_transport.c:104-110. spec/kiss-framing.md §1.1: a frame is FEND|CMD|DATA|FEND; bytes before any FEND are not within a frame. Code opens an implicit frame on any non-FEND byte and dispatches it when the first real FEND arrives (consuming that FEND as terminator). UART boot noise is delivered to upper layers with a fabricated cmd byte. Both reference impls skip leading non-FEND bytes. Fix: only FEND opens a frame.
